name: newsroom
description: 1.6.0 An agentic newsroom that turns a pitch into a polished trade media article. Two modes: /newsroom for the guided editorial state machine, and /newsroom-auto for autopilot — supply key points, killer quotes, and a timecoded transcript, and the system ships a draft end-to-end with no Socratic interrogation. Resume any session via /newsroom-resume.
